headline: Vultr and AMD Support the University of Cambridge's TESSERA AI Project to Accelerate Global Environmental Monitoring

headline: AMD to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic; AI startup to buy up to 2 GW of chips
summary: Advanced Micro Devices said on Wednesday it would invest up ‌to $5 billion in Anthropic and the artificial ‌intelligence startup would buy up to 2 gigawatts of ​AMD's latest-generation AI chips, beginning in the first half of 2027.  AMD has been seeking to expand its foothold in the fast-growing AI ‌chip market as ⁠developers look to diversify beyond Nvidia, while Anthropic has been racing to ⁠secure computing capacity to meet growing demand for its AI services.  The Wall Street Journal earlier ​reported that ​Anthropic would use ​some of the ‌chips at its own data centers and lease additional capacity through cloud providers and neocloud operators.

content.title: AMD to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic; AI startup to buy up to 2 GW of chips
content.summary: Advanced Micro Devices said on Wednesday it would invest up ‌to $5 billion in Anthropic and the artificial ‌intelligence startup would buy up to 2 gigawatts of ​AMD's latest-generation AI chips, beginning in the first half of 2027.  AMD has been seeking to expand its foothold in the fast-growing AI ‌chip market as ⁠developers look to diversify beyond Nvidia, while Anthropic has been racing to ⁠secure computing capacity to meet growing demand for its AI services.  The Wall Street Journal earlier ​reported that ​Anthropic would use ​some of the ‌chips at its own data centers and lease additional capacity through cloud providers and neocloud operators.

headline: Wiley Joins U.S. Department of Energy's Genesis Mission Consortium to Advance AI-Powered Scientific Discovery
summary: HOBOKEN, N.J., July 22, 2026--Wiley (NYSE: WLY) today announced its membership in the Genesis Mission Consortium, the public-private partnership supporting the U.S. Department of Energy's (DOE) Genesis Mission, joining organizations including Nvidia, AWS, Microsoft, IBM, and AMD. Wiley is the only scientific publisher among the consortium's members and has been invited to demonstrate its work today at the Genesis Mission Annual Summit in Washington, D.C.

content.title: Wiley Joins U.S. Department of Energy's Genesis Mission Consortium to Advance AI-Powered Scientific Discovery
content.summary: HOBOKEN, N.J., July 22, 2026--Wiley (NYSE: WLY) today announced its membership in the Genesis Mission Consortium, the public-private partnership supporting the U.S. Department of Energy's (DOE) Genesis Mission, joining organizations including Nvidia, AWS, Microsoft, IBM, and AMD. Wiley is the only scientific publisher among the consortium's members and has been invited to demonstrate its work today at the Genesis Mission Annual Summit in Washington, D.C.

summary: WASHINGTON, July 22, 2026--HPE (NYSE: HPE) today announced it has been selected to participate in multiple key research and development (R&D) projects in the first phase of the U.S. Department of Energy’s Genesis Mission. The awarded projects focus on advancing AI innovation and scientific discovery across AI model application, performance optimization, networking, cybersecurity, and water availability.

The awarded projects focus on advancing AI innovation and scientific discovery across AI model application, performance optimization, networking, cybersecurity, and water availability.

headline: AMD (AMD) Lands $5 Billion Anthropic Partnership For AI Chips
summary: AMD and Anthropic announced a multi year AI chip partnership valued at up to $5b. Anthropic plans to deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD GPUs using Helios rack scale solutions. The companies will co engineer to optimize Claude AI workloads on AMD accelerators. AMD will make a substantial investment in Anthropic as part of the agreement. Advanced Micro Devices, NasdaqGS:AMD, is moving deeper into AI infrastructure through this large collaboration with Anthropic. The deal arrives with the stock...
